Spoofing.description: JWT token validation vulnerability. Tampered token accepted. Signature not properly verified.
Spoofing.mitigation: Ensure proper validation of JWT signatures and claims.

Spoofing.description: CORS misconfiguration allows requests from any origin.
Spoofing.mitigation: Restrict CORS to trusted origins only.

Tampering.description: SQL injection vulnerability detected in login endpoint.
Tampering.evidence: Successful authentication with SQL injection payload.
Tampering.mitigation: Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection.

Tampering.description: XSS vulnerability detected. Payload reflected in response without proper encoding.
Tampering.mitigation: Implement proper input sanitization and output encoding.

InformationDisclosure.description: Information leakage detected. Different responses allow user enumeration.
InformationDisclosure.evidence: Responses for valid and invalid usernames differ.
InformationDisclosure.mitigation: Unify error messages for authentication failures.

InformationDisclosure.description: Path traversal vulnerability detected. System files accessible.
InformationDisclosure.evidence: Access to '/etc/passwd' via path traversal payload.
InformationDisclosure.mitigation: Implement strict input validation and sanitization for file paths.

DenialOfService.description: Absence of rate limiting allows brute force attacks.
DenialOfService.evidence: Multiple login attempts without blocking detected.
DenialOfService.mitigation: Implement rate limiting on login endpoints.

ElevationOfPrivilege.description: Weak password policy allows easy account compromise.
ElevationOfPrivilege.mitigation: Enforce strong password policies with complexity requirements.
